verticals_md_updated.section: ## 14. Land surveying firms (NAICS 541370) — COMPLETE — LOW-PE-ATTENTION VERTICAL (first run 2026-05-15)
verticals_md_updated.notes: Full vertical config added: spine source (TBPELS S3 CSVs), NAICS/filters, successor definition, recurring-revenue language, coasting tells, active acquirer platforms (LOW PE ATTENTION = OPPORTUNITY), SBA size estimation, sub-market nudges, rollout notes.

thesis_summary: TX land surveying is a STRUCTURALLY UNDERBID quiet recurring-B2B vertical. Only 2 PE-backed rollup platforms active (Bowman NASDAQ:BWMN + Westwood Endeavour Capital). Large-AEC strategics (Stantec/WSP/AECOM/Kimley-Horn/Cobb Fendley/LJA) only bolt-on $5M+ rev firms. The entire sub-$5M independent universe is structurally under-targeted. TX RPLS license (4yr college + 4yr apprentice + state exam) is a strong regulatory moat. ETA/search-fund appetite emerging fast 2024-2026 (top-15 vertical in Stanford Search Fund Study). +2 baseline L4 boost applied for solo-RPLS / 2-RPLS TX-metro firms as the opportunity zone.
